# Wolfblanc Architects — International

> Wolfblanc is an international architecture and design studio working across Spain, Sweden and Greece. The practice combines local professional authority with Nordic rigour, Mediterranean sensitivity and direct senior involvement.

## Staging status

This static replacement is in preparation. Every HTML page is noindex and robots.txt blocks crawling until the owner explicitly approves launch. The existing WordPress website remains the public record until then.

## Canonical website and language

- Canonical origin: https://wolfblanc.com/
- Default language and URL space: English at root URLs; there is no `/en/` prefix.
- Spanish is currently available as an on-page interface only where a complete translation exists. A separate indexable `/es/` tree should be introduced only when it is complete enough to maintain as a real publication.
- Historic `/en/`, `/es/`, `/sv/`, `/de/`, `/nl/` and `/fr/` URLs must be mapped contextually during the final redirect phase.

## Main sections

- Studio: https://wolfblanc.com/studio/
- Services: https://wolfblanc.com/services/
- Projects: https://wolfblanc.com/portfolio/
- Locations: https://wolfblanc.com/locations/
- Journal: https://wolfblanc.com/news/
- Careers: https://wolfblanc.com/careers/
- FAQ: https://wolfblanc.com/faq/
- Contact and booking: https://wolfblanc.com/contact/
- Newsletter: https://wolfblanc.com/newsletter/
- Legal, privacy and cookies: https://wolfblanc.com/legal/

## Services

1. Architecture
2. Landscape architecture
3. Urban design and masterplanning
4. Residential interiors
5. Commercial interiors and hospitality
6. Architectural visualization
7. Technical due diligence
8. BIM consultancy
9. Well-being architecture and WELL AP consulting
10. Project management

## Locations

Madrid, Barcelona, Valencia, Mallorca, Marbella and Galicia in Spain; Stockholm in Sweden; Athens and Thessaloniki in Greece.

## Content library

- 20 selected built-project and concept case studies, plus six clearly separated audience/service landing pages.
- 34 curated English journal articles selected from the former WordPress library for durable international relevance.
- Local WebP media is stored in the repository; published pages do not depend on WordPress uploads.

## Professional credentials

- Spain: COAM N.25160
- Sweden: SAR/MSA and F-skatt
- Greece: TEE-TCG N.168011
- WELL Accredited Professional
